patterns_discovered.widget_creation: ConsumerStatefulWidget with riverpod integration for reactive UI
patterns_discovered.state_watching: Multiple provider watchers (connectivity and sync status)
patterns_discovered.visibility_control: dual flags (_isVisible and _isManuallyDismissed) for complex visibility logic
patterns_discovered.ui_styling: Material 3 theme-aware design with errorContainer colors
patterns_discovered.resource_management: proper dispose() handling for lifecycle management

gotchas_discovered.state_tracking: need to track both current and previous states for proper transition detection
gotchas_discovered.dismissible_logic: manual dismissal shouldn't prevent automatic reappearance on connectivity changes
gotchas_discovered.lifecycle_resets: app foreground events should reset manual dismissal state
gotchas_discovered.provider_timing: multiple watchers need proper state ordering to avoid race conditions
gotchas_discovered.theme_styling: differentiating from sync banner using errorContainer vs primaryContainer colors

approach_outcome.architecture: follows established offline-first patterns with proper riverpod integration
approach_outcome.completeness: all 5 acceptance criteria met with comprehensive feature set
approach_outcome.integration: ready for app shell integration through offline_widgets.dart export
approach_outcome.quality: 243 lines of well-documented, theme-aware code with proper resource disposal

recommendations.testing: add unit tests for visibility logic and lifecycle management
recommendations.performance: consider memoization for frequently accessed provider values
recommendations.accessibility: add semantic labels for screen readers in all banner states
recommendations.localization: implement proper internationalization for banner messages
recommendations.error_handling: add fallback behavior for provider state errors
recommendations.maintenance: extract reusable badge widget for pending operations
recommendations.documentation: add usage examples and integration guidelines
